CONTENT.Club career: Bangré joined the youth academy of Toulouse at the age of 6. On 10 April 2021, he signed his first professional contract with Toulouse. He made his professional debut with the team in a 1–0 Ligue 2 win over Châteauroux on 10 April 2021.On 27 June 2022, Bangré joined Quevilly-Rouen on a season-long loan.
CONTENT.Personal life: Bangré's brother, Cheikh, is a semi-pro footballer who also came out of Toulouse's academy.
CONTENT.External links: Mamady Bangré at SoccerwayToulouse FC Profile
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Bangré holds French and Burkinabé nationalities. He debuted with the Burkina Faso national team in a friendly 5–0 loss to Kosovo on 24 March 2022.

SUMMARY: Mamady Alex Bangré (born 15 June 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for  Ligue 1 club Toulouse. Born in France, he plays for the Burkina Faso national team.
